subjects.description: majestic white swan gliding across a tranquil lake
subjects.appearance_details: elegant white plumage, long curved neck, smooth body, dark eye detail, and reflected silhouette on calm water
subjects.relationship: single graceful subject moving through the peaceful lake environment
subjects.location: center frame on the surface of a tranquil lake
subjects.relative_size: medium bird subject with broad water and foliage surrounding it
subjects.orientation: moving laterally across the frame with neck arched and head poised
subjects.pose: upright neck, body level on the water, wings folded close
subjects.action: maneuvers slowly through the calm water, creating ripples that mirror its silhouette
subjects.state_changes: ripples spread outward, reflection bends, neck angle shifts subtly, feathers catch changing light
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: white feathers with fine texture, soft highlights, and a smooth water reflection
subjects.facial_features: long neck, orange and black bill, dark eyes, refined head profile

background_setting: Calm tranquil lake bordered by lush verdant foliage and a few trees, still air, soft natural reflections, and peaceful water stretching behind the swan.

lighting.conditions: Gentle natural daylight with soft highlights on white feathers and subtle reflections across the water surface.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Gentle natural daylight with soft highlights on white feathers and subtle reflections across the water surface.

aesthetics.composition: Peaceful nature realism, clean white silhouette, green foliage, mirrored ripples, and quiet cinematic stillness.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Peaceful nature realism, clean white silhouette, green foliage, mirrored ripples, and quiet cinematic stillness.

cinematography.camera_motion: Medium shot at water level with the swan centered, slow lateral tracking, and a slight widening to show the lake setting.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Calm cinematic wildlife portrait with delicate movement and soft natural color.
context: A majestic white swan glides through a serene lake, its reflection and ripples creating a quiet dance on the water surface.

actions.description: The white swan enters the medium shot, gliding smoothly across calm lake water.
Ripples spread from its body and gently distort the mirrored silhouette beneath it.
The swan continues past lush foliage as the still lake holds its peaceful reflection.

segments.description: Introduce the swan in a medium water-level shot on the tranquil lake.
segments.key_changes: Feathers catch soft light, the first ripples appear around the body.

segments.description: Focus on the swan movement and reflection rippling across the surface.
segments.key_changes: Reflection bends, ripples widen, neck angle changes slightly.
segments.camera: Slow lateral tracking beside the swan.

segments.description: Reveal more foliage and calm water as the swan glides onward.
segments.key_changes: Lake remains still beyond the ripples, greenery adds depth behind the swan.
segments.camera: Slight widening shot while maintaining serene pace.

temporal_caption: A majestic white swan glides across a calm lake, sending ripples through its reflection beneath lush green foliage.
audio_description: Soft water lapping, faint bird calls, gentle rustle of distant leaves, and quiet outdoor stillness.
